prompt:
Goal: Create a dramatic Manchester United fan poster celebrating Bruno Fernandes breaking an assist record, with a premium sports-history look.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 4:5 aspect ratio, dark cinematic stadium background with floodlights in the upper left, smoky atmosphere, subtle gold sparks, black vignette edges, high contrast and glossy editorial sports design.

Layout: Use exactly 3 depictions of the same footballer: 1 large central foreground portrait from chest up wearing a red Manchester United home shirt and captain armband, hand placed over his heart; 1 smaller left-background rear-view figure in a dark kit showing the name “B. FERNANDES” and number “8”; 1 smaller bottom-right action figure in red kit sliding or kneeling in celebration with arms spread. Place the Manchester United crest at the top center-right above the typography. Put the huge record number on the right side, overlapping the central player slightly.

Text content: Include exactly 6 visible text groups: 1) “BRUNO FERNANDES” in small spaced gold letters near the top, 2) “RECORD BREAKING” in tall condensed white uppercase, 3) the giant number “21” in metallic gold with bevel, texture, and glow, 4) “ASSISTS” below the number in widely spaced gold letters, 5) a small bottom-left caption reading “MOST ASSISTS IN A SINGLE SEASON / IN A PREMIER LEAGUE SEASON / BY A MANCHESTER UNITED PLAYER”, and 6) kit details including “B. FERNANDES”, “8”, sponsor markings, and captain armband text where naturally visible.

Subject details: The footballer should resemble Bruno Fernandes, athletic build, short dark hair, trimmed facial hair, intense proud posture, Manchester United red shirt with black-and-white trim, club crest on chest, Adidas-style white shoulder/brand marks, sleeve sponsor, and captain armband. The central figure dominates the left and middle of the frame while the enormous gold “21” dominates the right.

Visual style: Photorealistic sports composite poster, cinematic stadium lighting, gold-and-black color grading, gritty texture, dramatic rim light around hair and shoulders, metallic gold typography, shallow depth, realistic fabric texture, sweat and skin detail, epic celebratory mood.

Constraints: Keep the design clean and poster-like, avoid extra players beyond the 3 listed depictions, avoid extra numbers or misleading stats, keep all typography sharp and legible, no watermark, no generic football club crest substitutions.
